name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express is located at 2230 N Collins St, Arlington, TX 76011 in the North Arlington neighborhood. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.9 stars across 391 reviews. Call +1 817-861-2414.
description_long: ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating physical store locations nationwide, offering quick access to emergency cash and related financial products. The company's primary services include installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services. They advertise fast funding options typical of the emergency cash lending category, positioning themselves for consumers who need immediate liquidity. ACE distinguishes itself through an extensive brick-and-mortar network (enabling in-person transactions), multi-service offerings beyond just loans, and online loan options for digital-first customers. The company operates in multiple states but service availability varies by location—some loan products are not available in certain states like Colorado based on regulatory restrictions. A significant caveat is that ACE operates in the high-cost lending space; customers should understand that emergency loans and title loans typically carry substantially higher interest rates and fees compared to traditional bank products. The company collects personal information from California residents under specific privacy notices, suggesting compliance with state-level financial data regulations.
pros: Multi-service financial hub offering installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services in one location
Physical store network enabling in-person service and immediate cash access without relying solely on online platforms
Online loan options available for customers preferring digital application and funding
Same-day or next-day funding available for qualifying emergency loans
Established company with dedicated customer service channels (phone and email support)
Check cashing and bill payment services provide financial access to unbanked/underbanked consumers
Business services and money transfer options expand utility beyond individual consumer lending
cons: Limited service availability by state and location—website shows 404 errors for Denver location, indicating service gaps or outdated site structure
Emergency and title loans carry significantly higher interest rates and fees compared to traditional bank alternatives
Website navigation issues (404 errors on specific location pages) suggest potential difficulties accessing store information or applying for specific products
Title loans require collateral (vehicle), creating repossession risk if borrowers cannot repay
High-cost lending product category makes ACE unsuitable as a primary financial institution for routine banking needs
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash ($100-$1,000) for emergencies and willing to pay higher rates for speed
Vehicle owners considering title loans as collateral-based borrowing options
Unbanked or underbanked individuals requiring check cashing and bill payment services
Customers in areas without traditional bank access preferring in-person financial transactions
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers facing genuine financial emergencies who need rapid access to small amounts of cash and are willing to accept high-cost lending terms. The primary caveat is that all ACE loan products carry significantly elevated interest rates and fees—these are expensive borrowing options suitable only for short-term emergencies, not ongoing financial solutions. Consumers should explore payday alternatives or credit union PALs before committing to ACE products.
